subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth from the realm of invincible might and made them a testimony unto all who are in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق من جبروت عز منیعا و جعلها حجه لمن فی السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God
